definitions.command: controller output before efferent/motor-channel noise, from state.net.output
definitions.command_jerk_norm: Euclidean norm of the second finite difference of command along time
definitions.command_norm: Euclidean norm of command at every evaluated time step
definitions.controller_feedback_scales: RMS and p95-norm scales computed from nominal rollout states.net.input trailing feedback channels. The reference scale is p95_norm.
definitions.endpoint_error_m: Euclidean distance between final effector position and final target
definitions.first_five_step_command_norm: command_norm restricted to the first min(5, n_time_steps) evaluated samples
definitions.gru_gate_saturation: bounded gate saturation uses value < 0.05 and value > 0.95; candidate saturation uses abs(value) > 0.95
definitions.hidden_state_norm: Euclidean norm of GRU hidden state at every evaluated time step
definitions.local_recurrent_jacobian: sampled hidden-to-hidden Jacobian of the GRU cell at rollout states; not a standard-certificate transition metric
definitions.overshoot_m: maximum positive projection past the final target along the initial-to-target reach axis; zero when the trajectory never crosses beyond the target
definitions.post_peak_forward_velocity_sign_changes: number of sign flips in reach-axis velocity after its per-trial peak, ignoring samples with absolute value <= 1e-06
definitions.terminal_speed_m_s: Euclidean norm of final effector velocity

gru_gates.equations: Equinox GRUCell reset/update/candidate gates evaluated on rollout states

local_recurrent_jacobians.sample_policy: hidden-to-hidden Jacobian d h_t / d h_{t-1}; trial 0 only; timepoints=('first', 'peak_forward_velocity', 'terminal')

standard_certificate_metrics.note: This sidecar records rollout behavior and recurrent-controller diagnostics only. Standard certificate and action/I/O mismatch metrics remain in the standard-certificate manifests.
